All 4 children exist with status=open and dependency edges recorded. No further implementation belongs at the parent level — the parent is a tracking bead and should remain open until children close. Closing it now would orphan the children (which list ddx-256af8b5 as a dep).

This is a triage outcome, not an implementation gap. The bead should stay parked under triage:needs-investigation until either (a) children complete and the parent can be closed, or (b) human triage decides to invert the dep direction so children unblock independently.
